lines.text: (low) [quietly] New kid on the gate tonight.
[flatly] Son, we were servicing this bay before your daddy made the varsity.
[deliberate] Tuesday net's at nineteen hundred. Your frequency card's taped under the console. Don't improvise.
[warmly] And Joss. Thank your dad for the radio.
(low) [quietly] D's flagged. Book says I open it.
[quietly] Net's quiet. Two clicks if it stays that way.
